THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TINMAHAN, SHEMI TINMAHAN, GAYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 KEARNY ST, #427 $4,031.04 RENT, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,127.04, LEASE FORFEITED, AND HOLD OVER PER DIEM FEES OF $24.28 PER DAY.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TINMAHAN, SHEMI TINMAHAN, GAYA
NOTICE OF APPEAL/REQUEST FOR TRANSCRIPT FILED BY DEFENDANT TINMAHAN, GAYA

JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK; BETH WILBER-CLERK; BRENDA FIELDS- REPORTER: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. MR. EVJE APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; GAYA TINMAHAN APPEARS AS DEFT. IN PRO PER; MS. TINMAHAN; NO APPEARANCE BY SHEMI TINMAHAN (HUSBAND). PARTIES CALL WITNESSES; AND AFTER TESTIMONY AND PRESENTING EVIDENCE BOTH PARTIES REST. BOTH PARTIES WAIVED OPENING STATEMENTS BUT PRESENT CLOSING STATEMENTS. MATTER IS SUBMITTED, MR. EVJE ALSO SUBMITS A JUDGMENT FORM. EVIDENCE AND OTHER DOCUMENTS RECEIVED BY JUDGE WICK ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT. (DEPT.611)
